rationale: Educ. Code §21.417 governs third-party contracts for teacher resources and liability insurance. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: From funds appropriated or otherwise available for the purpose, the agency shall contract with a third party to provide the following services for a classroom teacher employed under a probationary, continuing, or term contract:
_note: No conflict. This statute addresses teacher resources and liability insurance, not property tax exemptions.
